info.name: EverCut - Barber Profile & Shop
info.description: Barber shop profile and business management

request.description: Get the barber shop profile in onboarding-friendly shape. The response includes both the canonical shop fields and aliases such as `shopOwner`, `businessCategory`, `amenities`, `workingDays`, `workingHours`, `breakTimings`, `shopImages`, `photoUrl` for the owner picture, and a nested `upiDetails` object for the UPI screen.

formdata.description: Owner profile picture shown in Manage Account

request.description: Upload or replace the barber owner profile picture.

body.raw:
{
  "firstName": "John",
  "lastName": "Doe",
  "shopOwner": "John Doe",
  "email": "barber@example.com",
  "dateOfBirth": "1992-01-12",
  "gender": "Male",
  "shopName": "Downtown Cuts Studio",
  "businessCategory": "Barber",
  "targetCustomers": "men",
  "shopLocation": "MG Road, Bengaluru",
  "amenities": ["Air Conditioning", "Waiting Area", "Parking Area", "Wi-Fi"],
  "workingDays": ["Monday", "Tuesday", "Wednesday", "Thursday", "Friday", "Saturday"],
  "workingHours": {
    "opensAt": "08:30",
    "closesAt": "21:00"
  },
  "breakTimings": [
    {
      "startsAt": "13:00",
      "endsAt": "14:00"
    }
  ],
  "accountHolderName": "John Doe",
  "bankName": "HDFC Bank",
  "upiAddress": "john@upi",
  "bio": "Updated bio and description"
}

request.description: Update the barber profile using the same field aliases as the new onboarding flow. Canonical fields are still accepted, but these onboarding aliases are the preferred request shape.
Fetch the dedicated UPI payload used by the UPI Details screen. Returns `accountHolderName`, `bankName`, `upiId`, `upiAddress`, `isVerified`, and `verificationStatus`.
Update only the payment fields used by the dedicated UPI screen.
Update shop cover image (uploaded to Cloudinary).
Open or close shop. If isOpen not provided, it toggles current status.

Revokes all active Firebase refresh tokens for the authenticated barber so all existing sessions are forced to sign in again. Run this only when you are done with the current token, because subsequent requests will require a fresh sign-in.

PIN-protected barber account deletion. The barber `User` and `Shop` records are soft-deleted in MongoDB, the shop is hidden from active queries, and Firebase access is disabled so the deleted account can no longer log in.
